HGSS.112.0000:
Lance: [0103,0000,0000]!
In order to unlock the door to the\r
radio transmitter, you need the voice\r
of a certain person.\f
The name of the person is Petrel,
the Team Rocket Executive!\f
I have found out he is hiding in their
leader’s office!\f
Unfortunately though, that room is
also protected with a password...\f
[0103,0000,0000]!
We need the password to their leader’s\r
office first!\f
HGSS.112.0001:
Lance: [0103,0000,0000]!
In order to unlock the door to the\r
radio transmitter, you need the voice\r
of a certain person.\f
The name of the person is Petrel,
the Team Rocket Executive!\f
I have found out he is hiding in their
leader’s office!\f
Unfortunately though, that room is
also protected with a password...\f
[0103,0000,0000]!
We need the password to their leader’s\r
office first!\f
HGSS.112.0002:
Urrggh...
The guy in the cape is incredibly\r
tough...and I had no choice\r
but to tell him all the secrets about\r
this hideout...\f
Except that our leader’s office is
protected with two passwords!
HGSS.112.0003:
[0103,0000,0000]: ...\f
So you are messing with them again.\f
Humph, you must really like Team Rocket
so much.\f
...Tell me, who was the guy in the cape
who used Dragon-type Pokémon?\f
My Pokémon were no match at all.\f
I don’t care that I lost. I can beat
him by getting stronger Pokémon.\f
It’s what he said that bothers me...
He told me that I don’t love and\r
trust my Pokémon enough.\f
I’m furious that I lost to a bleeding
heart like him.\f
...Humph! I don’t have the time for the
likes of you!\f
HGSS.112.0004:
Muhahaha, we’ve been waiting for you.
So, you are [0103,0000,0000]...\f
Me?
You don’t know who I am?\f
It is me, Giovanni.
The majestic Giovanni himself!\r
Wahahaha!\f
HGSS.112.0005:
...Huh?
I don’t sound anything like Giovanni?\f
I don’t even look like Giovanni?
How come? I’ve worked so hard\r
to mimic him!\f
HGSS.112.0006:
Petrel: I am a Team Rocket Executive!\f
You must be trying to sneak into the
radio-transmitter room.\r
Well, that’s not going to happen.\f
That room is protected with a special
password. The password is\r
“Hail Giovanni.”\r
Surprised to hear it from me?\f
Knowing the password won’t help
you though.\f
The door won’t open unless I say the
password. It only reacts to my voice.\f
HGSS.112.0007:
Petrel: Since disbanding Team Rocket
three years ago, our Giovanni has\r
been missing.\f
But we’re certain he’s been waiting
for the right time for our revival...\f
Wahahaha!\f
Losing to you won’t change the fact
that you are unable to get in the\r
radio-transmitter room!\f
You need my voice to unlock it!\f
HGSS.112.0009:
MURKROW is mimicking
the voice of Petrel!\f
You may be able to...!?\f
HGSS.112.0011:
The door’s closed...\f
It needs two passwords
to open it.
HGSS.112.0012:
The door’s closed...\f
[0103,0000,0000] entered the
two passwords.\f
The door opened!\f
